_comment: Act 1 (the GitHub side) rrweb tour. Captures the static gh-thread.html fixture over file:// with slidey's rrweb tour engine. Each step mirrors github-demo-manifest.ts (GITHUB_DEMO_STEPS) ids/labels/dwellMs and spotlights the matching data-testid. Pure DOM — no clicks, no navigation: each beat just scrolls its target into view and dwells, so the engine's default advance:'next' is exactly right. Emits in-log slidey.chapter custom events → chapters:'auto' lower-thirds with no sidecar. Regenerate: node /Users/brad/code/slidey/src/index.js capture <this> <out>.rrweb.json --format rrweb (target.url is absolute to this worktree's fixture).

steps.label: kitsoki acks with one run link
A feature issue routes to the design track
It watches CI and pushes a fix
Reviewer asks; kitsoki implements and resolves
One rolling status, edited to done
